---
title: "The R Environment for Strategic Computation"
short-title: "R Environment"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Setting up RStudio, renv, and project conventions for game-theoretic computation."
keywords: ["R", "RStudio", "renv", "project setup"]
---

# The R Environment {#sec-r-environment}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
